---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  fields: [title, date, categories, description]
  feed: true
toc: false
---

Short essays, practical notes, and project updates.

The initial public launch is planned around two complementary posts:

- a foundation post on AI assistance and human responsibility
- a practical post on synthetic data workflows

That pairing should make the purpose of the repository clear from the start.
